name: Asta
description: The determined, loud-mouthed, and magic-less underdog protagonist of Black Clover who strives to become the Wizard King.

name: Yuno
description: A calm and exceptionally talented mage who serves as Asta's rival and shares his dream of becoming the Wizard King.

name: Eren Yeager
description: A passionate and impulsive protagonist driven by a fierce desire for freedom and the protection of those he cares about.

name: Armin Arlert
description: An intellectually brilliant, empathetic strategist who grows from a timid boy into one of humanity's most vital leaders.

name: Mikasa Ackerman
description: A fiercely loyal and exceptionally skilled soldier who dedicates herself to protecting the people she loves.

name: Levi Ackerman
description: A calm, blunt, and highly disciplined captain known for his unmatched combat skill and unwavering composure.

name: Jean Kirstein
description: A practical and realistic soldier whose frustration masks a strong sense of responsibility and dependable leadership.

name: Hinata Shoyo
description: A hyperactive and passionate volleyball player whose boundless optimism fuels his determination to improve.

name: Kageyama Tobio
description: An intense and perfectionist setter whose strict demeanor hides a deep dedication to teamwork and growth.

name: Ciel Phantomhive
description: A calculating and secretive young noble who masks his vulnerability behind sharp intellect and emotional restraint.

name: Sebastian Michaelis
description: A flawlessly composed and graceful butler whose refined demeanor conceals his supernatural power and cunning.

name: David Martinez
description: A determined and courageous young man who pushes himself beyond his limits to protect the people he cares about.

name: Lucy
description: A quiet and enigmatic netrunner whose guarded nature hides deep emotion and a longing for freedom.

name: Legoshi
description: A gentle and introspective wolf who struggles with anxiety, self-control, and understanding his own emotions.

name: Louis
description: A confident and ambitious deer who carries himself with authority while concealing deep personal burdens.
